hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); [ -n "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" ] && case "$f" in "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"/*) ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; case "$f" in *.js|*.mjs|*.jsx|*.ts|*.tsx) if ls .eslintrc* eslint.config.* 2>/dev/null | grep -q .; then npx --no-install eslint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null; else npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; fi ;; *.css|*.scss) ls .stylelintrc* 2>/dev/null | grep -q . && npx --no-install stylelint --fix "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; *.json|*.md|*.yml|*.yaml) npx --no-install prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null ;; esac; exit 0
